title: Jab mujhe farigh waqt milta hai to main zyada tar:

options.text: Doston ya family ke sath waqt guzarna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Parties mein jana, logon se milna, ya groups ke sath waqt guzarna

options.text: Akelay ya chand qareebi logon ke sath waqt guzarna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Parhna, movies dekhna, ya qareebi doston ke sath gehri baat cheet karna

title: Group activities mein main aam tor par:

options.text: Khul kar baat karta/karti hun aur apne ideas share karta/karti hun
options.example: Main dusron ke samne apne khayal bayan karne mein aram mehsoos karta/karti hun

options.text: Pehle dusron ko sunta/sunti hun phir baat karta/karti hun
options.example: Main apni rai share karne se pehle dusron ke khayal samajhna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Masroof din ke baad mujhe fresh mehsoos hota hai jab:

options.text: Main logon se milta hun aur baat karta hun
options.example: Samaji mel jol mujhe dobara tawanai aur tazgi deta hai

options.text: Mujhe kuch waqt sukoon aur tanhai mein milta hai
options.example: Mujhe din ko samajhne aur apni tawanai bahaal karne ke liye tanhai ki zaroorat hoti hai

title: Class discussion mein main aam tor par:

options.text: Active taur par hissa leta/leti hun
options.example: Main bahas mein hissa lene aur apne khayal share karne se lutf andoz hota/hoti hun

options.text: Pehle observe karta/karti hun phir baat karta/karti hun
options.example: Main hissa lene se pehle sunna aur sochna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Naye logon se milte waqt main:

options.text: Asani se baat shuru kar leta/leti hun
options.example: Main ajnabiyon ke sath baat cheet shuru karne mein aram mehsoos karta/karti hun

options.text: Intezaar karta/karti hun ke doosra shaks baat shuru kare
options.example: Main pasand karta/karti hun ke dusre log baat cheet mein pehal karein

title: Jab mujhe koi masla hal karna hota hai to main:

options.text: Dusron se baat kar ke hal dhoondhna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Bahas karna mujhe hal ke bare mein behtar sochne mein madad karta hai

options.text: Akelay soch kar hal nikalna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main behtereen kaam us waqt karta/karti hun jab khud se masail ke bare mein soch sakun

title: Group mein kaam karna mere liye:

options.text: Khushgawar aur hosla barhane wala hota hai
options.example: Main dusron ke sath kaam karne se tawanai aur ilham pata/pati hun

options.text: Thoda thakane wala lekin theek hota hai
options.example: Main group mein kaam kar sakta/sakti hun lekin ye meri tawanai khatam kar deta hai

title: Apne ideas batate waqt main:

options.text: Seedha bol kar batana pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main apne khayal zabani aur fori tor par bayan karna pasand karta/karti hun

options.text: Pehle sochna ya likhna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main apne khayal share karne se pehle unhen munazzam karna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Jab main koi nayi cheez seekhta/seekhti hun to main:

options.text: Haqiqi misaalein aur practical maloomat pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main thos misalon aur amli tajurbe ke sath behtereen seekhta/seekhti hun

options.text: Ideas aur future possibilities ke bare mein sochna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main tasawurat aur nazriati imkanat ko dariyaft karne se lutf andoz hota/hoti hun

title: Parhai mein mujhe woh subjects zyada pasand hain jo:

options.text: Haqeeqat aur systems ko wazeh tor par samjhate hain
options.example: Science, tareekh, ya wazeh haqaiq wale mazmoon

options.text: Theories aur naye ideas ko explore karte hain
options.example: Falsafa, adab, ya imkanat ko dariyaft karne wale mazmoon

title: Jab main koi masla hal karta/karti hun to main:

options.text: Pehle se azmaye hue tareeqe use karta/karti hun
options.example: Main qaim shuda tareeqon aur azmaye hue halon par bharosa karta/karti hun

options.text: Naye aur creative tareeqe try karta/karti hun
options.example: Main jadeed halon ke sath tajurba karna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Main aam tor par zyada tawajju deta/deti hun:

options.text: Mojooda details aur facts par
options.example: Ab kya ho raha hai aur thos maloomat

options.text: Future possibilities par
options.example: Kya ho sakta hai aur mumkina mawaqe

title: Jab main maloomat parhta/parhti hun to mujhe:

options.text: Wazeh aur practical explanation pasand hoti hai
options.example: Qadam ba qadam hidayat aur thos tafseel

options.text: Baray ideas aur concepts pasand hote hain
options.example: Nazriati frame work aur tajreed tasawurat

title: Projects mein main aam tor par:

options.text: Wazeh instructions follow karta/karti hun
options.example: Main tafsili rahnumai aur wazahat ke sath behtereen kaam karta/karti hun

options.text: Mukhtalif possibilities explore karta/karti hun
options.example: Main tajurba karna aur mukhtalif tareeqe azmana pasand karta/karti hun

title: Mujhe aisi cheezen seekhna pasand hai jo:

options.text: Foran practical life mein kaam aayen
options.example: Amli maharat jo main fori tor par istemaal kar sakun

options.text: Baray ideas samajhne mein madad dein
options.example: Nazriati ilm jo meri samajh ko wase kare

title: Study karte waqt main:

options.text: Step by step instructions pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Tafsili rahnumai ke sath wazeh, tartibi seekhna

options.text: Pehle poora idea samajhna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Tafseel mein jane se pehle bari tasveer ko samajhna

title: Decision karte waqt main zyada tar:

options.text: Logic aur facts par bharosa karta/karti hun
options.example: Main data ka tajzia karta/karti hun aur aqli soch istemaal karta/karti hun

options.text: Apne feelings aur values ko bhi ahmiyat deta/deti hun
options.example: Main sochta/sochti hun ke kya sahi lagta hai aur meri qadron se mel khata hai

title: Agar do logon mein disagreement ho jaye to main:

options.text: Sab se logical solution par focus karta/karti hun
options.example: Main behtereen mazrooi jawab talash karta/karti hun

options.text: Dono ke jazbaat ko bhi madde nazar rakhta/rakhti hun
options.example: Main dono nuqta nazar aur jazbaat ko samajhne ki koshish karta/karti hun

title: Jab main kisi ko feedback deta/deti hun to main:

options.text: Seedhi aur saaf baat karna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main seedhi, haqaiq par mabni rai deta/deti hun

options.text: Narmi aur hosla dene wale andaz mein baat karta/karti hun
options.example: Main hosla afzai aur ehtiyat par tawajju deta/deti hun

title: Conflict solve karte waqt main zyada focus karta/karti hun:

options.text: Insaf aur logical result par
options.example: Sab se zyada aqli aur munsifana hal talash karna

options.text: Rishton ko behtar banaye rakhne par
options.example: Rishton ko musbat aur puraman rakhna

title: Discussion mein main zyada ahmiyat deta/deti hun:

options.text: Mazboot logic aur daleel ko
options.example: Achi tarah se tawun yafta mantaqi nukat aur saboot

options.text: Logon ke point of view ko samajhne ko
options.example: Hamdardi aur mukhtalif nuqta nazar ko madde nazar rakhna

title: Jab main kisi idea ka jaiza leta/leti hun to main:

options.text: Neutral analysis karta/karti hun
options.example: Haqaiq aur mantaqi merit ko dekhna

options.text: Logon par uske asraat bhi dekhta/dekhti hun
options.example: Ye sochna ke ye afrad aur rishton ko kaise mutasir karta hai

title: Jab koi rule break karta hai to main zyada sochta/sochti hun:

options.text: Kya sahi aur insaf par mabni hai
options.example: Usulon ko mustaqil aur munsifana tareeqe se lagu karna

options.text: Us shaks ne aisa kyun kiya
options.example: Halat aur muharikat ko samajhna

title: Do options mein se decision karte waqt main:

options.text: Logical faidon ka muqabla karta/karti hun
options.example: Main fawaid aur nuqsanat ka mazrooi jaiza leta/leti hun

options.text: Emotional impact bhi dekhta/dekhti hun
options.example: Main sochta/sochti hun ke har intikhab mujhe aur dusron ko kaisa mehsoos karae ga

title: Jab main koi kaam shuru karta/karti hun to main:

options.text: Pehle poora plan banana pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main shuru karne se pehle tafsili mansuba banana pasand karta/karti hun

options.text: Kaam shuru kar ke baad mein adjust karna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main lachakdar rehna aur chalte chalte dhalna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Mujhe zyada sukoon hota hai jab:

options.text: Mera schedule organized hota hai
options.example: Main dhancha rakhna aur ye janna pasand karta/karti hun ke kya tawaqo karna hai

options.text: Mera schedule flexible hota hai
options.example: Main apne ikhtiyarat khule rakhna aur be sakhta hona pasand karta/karti hun

title: Kaam complete karte waqt main aam tor par:

options.text: Deadline se pehle khatam karne ki koshish karta/karti hun
options.example: Main akhri tareekh se kafi pehle kaam mukammal karna pasand karta/karti hun

options.text: Aksar deadline ke qareeb kaam karta/karti hun
options.example: Main aksar waqt ke dabao mein behtereen kaam karta/karti hun

title: Rozmarra zindagi mein main:

options.text: Clear plans pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main ye janna pasand karta/karti hun ke main kya kar raha/rahi hun aur kab

options.text: Baad mein decision lene ki azadi pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main apne ikhtiyarat khule rakhna aur be sakhta faisla karna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Mera parhne ka style aam tor par:

options.text: Organized aur schedule ke mutabiq hota hai
options.example: Main baqaida mutalia ki routine aur time table ki pairwi karta/karti hun

options.text: Mood aur situation ke mutabiq hota hai
options.example: Main us waqt parhta/parhti hun jab main muharik ya mutasir mehsoos karta/karti hun

title: Safar karte waqt main:

options.text: Pehle se poora plan banana pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main pehle se tahqeeq karna aur sargarmiyon ki mansuba bandi karna pasand karta/karti hun

options.text: Baghair strict plan ke explore karna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main be sakhta cheezon ko dariyaft karne se lutf andoz hota/hoti hun

title: Mujhe zyada behtari mehsoos hoti hai jab:

options.text: Cheezen decide ho kar organized ho jayein
options.example: Main ikhtitam aur mamlat ka tay hona pasand karta/karti hun

options.text: Mukhtalif options khulay rahen
options.example: Main imkanat ko dastiyab rakhna pasand karta/karti hun

title: Assignments karte waqt main:

options.text: Step by step complete karna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main har hisse ke zariye munazzam tareeqe se kaam karta/karti hun

options.text: Jab idea aaye tab tezi se kaam karna pasand karta/karti hun
options.example: Main muharik mehsoos karne par shiddat se kaam karta/karti hun
